ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "loop" INTEGER /* Loop number of the experiment */,
  "restore_best_weights" INTEGER /* Whether to restore the best weights */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter set */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that uses these hyperparameters */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for the experiment */,
  "validate_loss_improvement_delta" REAL /* Validate loss improvement delta for the experiment */,
  "validate_loss_improvement_patience" INTEGER /* Validate loss improvement patience for the experiment */,
  "num_layers" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the neural network */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the experiment */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the neural network */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in the neural network */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the neural network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hidden_functions" (
  "hidden_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hidden function */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that uses this hidden function */,
  "hidden_func" TEXT /* Hidden function used in the neural network (e.g., sigmoid, tanh, relu) */,
  "layer_index" INTEGER /* Index of the layer where the hidden function is applied */,
  "hidden_function_type" TEXT /* Type of hidden function (e.g., conv2d, dense, lstm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hidden_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hidden_functions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hidden_widths" (
  "hidden_width_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hidden width */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that uses this hidden width */,
  "hidden_width" INTEGER /* Width of the hidden layer in the neural network */,
  "layer_index" INTEGER /* Index of the layer where the hidden width is applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hidden_width_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hidden_widths_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that these metrics belong to */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss of the experiment */,
  "validate_loss" REAL /* Validation loss of the experiment */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Test loss of the experiment */,
  "loss_product" REAL /* Loss product of the experiment */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the experiment */,
  "validate_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy of the experiment */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the experiment */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., loss, accuracy, f1_score) */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch at which the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metadata" (
  "training_metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training metadata */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that these metadata belong to */,
  "train_time" REAL /* Training time of the experiment */,
  "num_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for the experiment */,
  "average_epoch_time" REAL /* Average epoch time of the experiment */,
  "gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage during training */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metadata_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)
